audit_items.proof_trace: The `s_entered` guard (L415-418) blocks re-entry into `bid()` for the duration of the call, while `assetOutAmount` (L442) and `assetOut` (L446) are cached in stack variables before any external call, making the post-callback `safeTransferFrom` immune to storage mutations. All admin functions that modify `s_auctionStarts` or `s_assetOut` either require privileged roles (`AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE`, `ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE`, `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE`) unavailable to an ordinary bidder, or are blocked by `_whenNoLiveAuctions()` (L668-671) which reverts with `LiveAuction()` whenever `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0` — a condition that holds throughout the entire `bid()` execution.
